[{"key":"0.742166501674320226","type":"illustrated-book","data":[{"key":"0.57f4aa01dcb5a","type":"tab-info","data":{"title":"","tabList":[{"key":"0.ecc481237e84","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-1","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1920/h_1080/50364/157597/2024/3/25/998305.png","//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/orc/role_picture1/5360670a-e355-4ddc-9184-ecf7be6c5e89.png"],"type":"image"},{"key":"0.ab8be2dcb30cd","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-2","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1200/h_1920/50364/157597/2024/3/25/407084.png","//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/orc/role_picture2/ffb0baf0-8669-4b9b-8a44-1f8d2812be20.png"],"type":"image"}]}},{"key":"0.9433e94a5aca8","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"基本资料","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"缇亚马特"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者协会评定"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者缇亚马特，身份编码L09-122616，Re-A芯片状态故障，无法进行定位和监测。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"缇亚马特是有记录以来原质能量强度最高的异格者之一据说，在特定条件下，她的原质能量强度可以突破异格者的极限。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"但她作为实验室中诞生的造物，似乎并不具备正常异格者的情感，再加上她拥有能够轻易摧毁一个实验基地的强大力量，因此被E.O.S.列入了重犯通名单。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"在她的原质能力当中，最有威胁性的就是人格复制与人格操纵。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"协会绝对不建议未达到等级的超链者与这样一位神秘而危的异格者打交道一一如果非要这么做，那就必须具备"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.bfc12efaafc","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"稀有度"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","chi ata":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"受到的治疗效果"},{"text":"+10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.c824ad3488246","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/530081.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"基础属性提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"基础攻击力、防御力和生命值提升"},{"text":"5%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.e7d0741f09395","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/960068.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"暴击率提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"暴击率"},{"text":"+8%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.b5b0e217a380b","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/357114.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"伤害提升和伤害减免","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"造成伤害额外提升"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"，受到伤害额外降低"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]}]}},{"key":"0.8fb62f21e416a","type":"skill-info","data":{"title":"异格档案","isShowTabs":true,"tabs":[{"key":"0.b059cc403d5a6","label":"记忆片段Ⅰ"},{"key":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","label":"记忆片段Ⅱ"},{"key":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","label":"记忆片段Ⅲ"}],"skillList":[{"key":"0.1c98b1326610d","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.b059cc403d5a6","icon":"","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"记忆片段|"}]}]},"label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【回忆是死寂的深海】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"记忆往往会与情感相勾连，本应如此。但是对缇亚马特来说，她的回忆就像一片寂静的深海，自诞生以来就毫无波澜。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"实验室中的每一天，与过去的任何一天都并无不同。仪器发出的蜂鸣一成不变，实验员也总是那么几张面孔，就连数据异常时，从身体中涌出的痛苦，都无比熟悉。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"她甚至可以像一个旁观者那样，冷静地审视过去的自己，像翻看一本闲书那样，翻阅着过往的回忆。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"毕竟，每一天的缇亚马特，都是一个全新的人格。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"回忆可以共享，可情绪却难以感同身受，也许她曾经焦躁、恐惧、绝望、癲狂……但现在都已无从得知。那些无用的情绪早就随着人格的消亡一起消失无踪。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"缇亚马特从回忆中醒来，眼前的实验员似乎和往常有所不同。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「该实验体的原质强度提升已经进入平台期，推测需要额外的刺激才能取得进一步增长。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「试试第十三套方案。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「基地的供能系统负荷不足，还是调整为第二十七套方案吧。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"实验员们交流时，完全没有避讳缇亚马特，似乎并不认为她是一个能够独立思考的个体。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"很快，所有实验员都忙碌起来，预示着某种「日常」即将被打破。"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果","iconSize":{"width":"60px","height":"60px"}},{"key":"0.ad923e74cde51","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【情绪是力量的燃料】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"很久没有感受过这种强烈的情绪了，好像有一团烈火在胸口熊熊燃烧，随时都会喷涌而出，将周围的一切都焚烧殆尽。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"缇亚马特缓缓睁开眼，久违地看见了阳光，那个常年不见天日的实验基地，如今已经不复存在，只留下一个恐怖的深坑。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"通过翻阅自己的回忆，她能看见自己是如何被激发出力量，又是如何释放原质炸碎了拘束装置。最终，没有任何生命能逃过火焰的吞噬，号称固若金汤的实验基地，也化作焦土。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"狂热的实验员将她称为「天使」，他们直到最后也没有明白，为什么他们所追求的神圣造物，反而是摧毁一切的元凶。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「天使啊·……」她咀嚼了一下这个词汇，低低地嘲笑出声。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"这一刻，她清晰地感受到了不断涌出的情绪。这个名为愤怒的怪兽，原来一直寄宿在自己的身体中、流淌在血液里。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"愤怒是无法自己平息的，越是被囚禁，就越是疯狂生长，左冲右撞，试图找到一个发泄的缺口。它串联起了千千万万个人格的共同回忆，而这些人格凝聚在一起，爆发出了毁天灭地的强大力量。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"随着最后一点火星熄灭，缇亚马特也重归平静，她径直离开了这片废墟，没有再看一眼曾经囚禁自己的牢笼。"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"},{"key":"0.021e73c84bff8","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【梦境是现实的剪影】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"缇亚马特从不知道自己还能够做梦—一在陷入沉眠之前，她并没想过自己有一天能够安稳地入睡。即便如此，她还是立刻意识到了眼前的一切就是他人口中的「梦境」。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"整个空间充斥着错乱无序的实验仪器、培养皿与约束装置，无数长得完全一致的虚拟人格在热烈地交谈。就像是将她记忆中的某一页剪碎了拼接起来，糅合成了这个可笑而离奇的场景。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"仿佛是因为她意识到了自己正在做梦，周围的空气都变得凝滞黏腻起来，挤压、缠绕着她的身躯，拼命将她排斥出这个世界。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"她很快就从这场「梦」中醒来，光怪陆离的景象如同退潮那般迅速消散。就连实验室里那些阴沉可憎的回忆，好像也随着这场梦境一起变得荒诞、模糊，并逐渐远去。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"她感到有些惋惜，这难得的安眠只持续了不到一个标准时。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"然而她已不能再睡下去，一股强烈的危机预兆涌上心头，她知道，那些阴魂不散的追击者又在搜寻她的踪迹，马上就要找到她的藏身处了。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"离开出生地之后，她漫无目的地走了很远很远，但这还不够。一场短暂又迷离的幻梦过后，她有了新的方向——找到一个永远不会被打扰的安眠之地。"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"}]}},{"key":"0.1049e8819bc1f","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"推荐搭配","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"角色简评"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【战术定位】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":" 坦克，输出手，pvp"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【养成建议】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"┌─────────┬────────────┐"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 技能优先级 | 515|"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 源器配置 | 右三主属暴击率，生命加成，生命加成 |"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"└─────────┴────────────┘"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【对局表现】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":" pvp非常强力的存在，配合善雅和凌罗，变身后pvp所有角色都拜倒在龙妈脚下"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.40c2363e9c1fe","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐源器"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"12浴血之躯+8荆棘+6巨壁屏障"}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true},{"key":"0.01e16842bb3ed","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐智壳"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"琥珀"}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true},{"key":"0.607ed15092015","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐攻略"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"待补充..."}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true}],"imageSize":{"width":"160px","height":"160px"},"imagesList":[],"imageList":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_300/h_242/50364/842288/2025/7/18/306126.png"]}}],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"key":"4paRDdH5hotQ8vpw","type":"illustrated-book","data":[],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]
